description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender shaft with a robust, octagonal base that provides stability. The shaft is adorned with subtle vertical ridges and decorative banding near the top, leading to a capital with classical motifs. The lamp head is a flat, square platform, lacking any visible bulb or globe, suggesting a minimalist or industrial design. The entire structure appears to be made of dark, weathered metal, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. There are no visible light fixtures, signage, or attachments, and the post is free of ornate embellishments. The overall design is functional, with a slight nod to classical architectural elements in the capital.
description: A tall, dark metal lamppost with a square, flat lamp head and subtle classical detailing at the top, standing on a sturdy octagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height, octagonal base, and decorative capital with vertical ridges.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same slender shaft and base, with the square lamp head clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, highlighting the symmetrical design and classical motifs on the capital.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the uniformity and lack of attachments.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Flat, square platform with minimalist industrial styling and no visible bulb or globe.
